capabilityGroups.name: Prompt intake and plan shaping
capabilityGroups.description: Capture the request once and preserve structured planning context across apps.

capabilityGroups.name: Council review and verification
capabilityGroups.description: Run bounded review and keep approval visible before action.

capabilityGroups.name: Template and model selection
capabilityGroups.description: Expose donor template catalogs, model hubs, and route-shaping choices before generation.

capabilityGroups.name: Workspace lifecycle, artifacts, and handoff
capabilityGroups.description: Expose the same workspace, sync, sandbox, and generated-output story across browser and workstation surfaces.

capabilityGroups.name: Repo visibility, files, and docs
capabilityGroups.description: Keep repo state, docs shortcuts, and file editing anchored to the workstation.

capabilityGroups.name: Validation and runtime recovery
capabilityGroups.description: Make guarded execution and runtime checks explicit and operator-visible.

capabilityGroups.name: Companion UX and resilience cues
capabilityGroups.description: Carry companion modes, Kairos world-state, and graceful degraded-state cues across the public and local surfaces.

capabilityGroups.name: AgentCraft local observability
capabilityGroups.description: Mirror approved BMO runtime lifecycle cues into a local HUD without changing runtime authority.

documentShortcuts.description: Shared capability map and trust boundaries.

documentShortcuts.description: How browser planning surfaces hand off to the local workstation.

documentShortcuts.description: How prismtek.dev_mega-app and BMO-app map into Builder Studio, Prism Agent, and BMO.

documentShortcuts.name: AgentCraft Integration
documentShortcuts.description: Local-only AgentCraft HUD bridge, event mapping, and safety defaults.
